label: json-server (local fake REST API)
description: A real local HTTP server (json-server) serving a genuine REST API from a db.json fixture file — unlike the 'mock' option (in-memory data, no real HTTP at all), this exercises the real HttpClient/interceptor chain against real network requests.
claudeMdSummaryLine: Data layer: json-server (local fake REST API from db.json, real HTTP)
